lines.text: New here? Come in, take a seat. No need to be nervous. I'm the... temporary person in charge of this interstellar dispatch office.
Do you know about the Milky Way Human Resources Department?
Great, to put it simply — lately there's been a huge wave of alien job seekers flooding in. They're all bored out of their minds on their home planets and want to find somewhere new to work.
Not knowing is fine too. Anyway, they only send emails.
Long story short, a bunch of alien job seekers have been pouring in recently. They're tired of staying on their own planets and want to switch things up and find a new place to work.
The problem is, some of these alien creatures have terrible tempers, some have IQs lower than a rock, and some even...
Yeah, they love eating their coworkers.
Our job is to test them, then stuff them into suitable planets.
If you get everything right, you might even receive a big congratulatory bonus from headquarters~
Next, your senior colleague Woofie will show you the basics of dispatch work.
All in all, good luck, kiddo. Ciao~!

1.name: Budya
1.description: An extraterrestrial paradise born from pure, innocent hearts. A world composed of harmless flora and fauna.
1.planetneed: Everyone is welcome to join OVO!

2.name: Tonis
2.description: Highly commercialized. The designated supplier for the Interstellar Alliance.
2.planetneed: Hiring hair stylists. Speak with your hands, come quickly!

3.name: Shawshank
3.description: Over 80% of the planet is ocean. The only landmass hosts the galaxy’s most heavily guarded maximum-security prison.
3.planetneed:
Urgent need for 10 maintenance workers.
“The highest bounty for an escaped prisoner is 503,333…”

4.name: Screw
4.description: A collective of intelligent mechanical spirals. The entire planet has been transformed into a massive starship.
4.planetneed:
Hiring crew members.
Old exploration-type robots welcome. Only the core needs to be intact.
The ship has ample space and no wear-and-tear issues.

5.name: Arrakis
5.description: Once rich with immense energy sources, now a lawless paradise for outlaws after drying up.
5.planetneed: It's a Sicilian message. It means Luca Brasi sleeps withthe fishes.Send it and you take the money.

6.name: Lost Eden
6.description: A garden of Eden-like bliss. If you can imagine it, you can have endless joy here.
6.planetneed: Work? No, come play. Your only responsibility is to make yourself happy — and feel free to tell others how to be even happier.

7.name: Jelly
7.description: The planet’s surface is covered in gelatinous material. The favorite amusement park destination for interstellar families with children.
7.planetneed: Do you enjoy bouncing and jumping with kids on soft, squishy jelly? We need a “Drowning Rescue Assistant” to pull little ones out of the jelly pits, make them laugh, and keep them safe. Don’t worry about getting sticky — use your strength and keep a sweet smile! Staff get free access to all facilities.

8.name: Cinnabar Eye
8.description: The atmosphere consists of hydrogen and helium. The largest gas giant in the Kartos Star System.
8.planetneed:
Position: Lead Scout
Duties: Enter unexplored zones and collect resource data along with risk parameters.
Compensation: Paid based on valid records. Management only recycles your reports — we do not guarantee returning your original body.

9.name: Surukan
9.description: A realm of serene silence. Every citizen focuses solely on themselves.
9.planetneed:
Position: Boundary Keeper
Duties: Protect the personal domain boundaries of every citizen and prevent unnecessary contact or interference.
Requirements: Fairness and timely handling.
Compensation: Regular resource subsidies plus a private personal domain during your term of service.

10.name: Tarasus
10.description: An ocean of trees. Countless roots intertwine and fuse together, united as one.
10.planetneed: Roots entwined with roots — though they occasionally tangle and twist. The old village chief has stiff legs and speaks slowly. We’re short a translator who can listen to both sides of the tree-root conversations.
